betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Osmiridium & Gerald The Construction Android§f

§aLaunch the largest bomb in existence — then harvest osmiridium from the crater!§f

§6Gerald The Construction Android§f
§bGerald§f is an endgame satellite/android that must be forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f and launched on the §bSoyuz-FG§f. After impact, he creates a massive crater filled with osmiridium-infused tektite.

§6Forging Gerald§f (Plasma Forge):
Duration: §e600 seconds§f | Power: §e1 GHE/s§f | Plasma: §e500 MTU/s§f | Total: §e600 GHE§f
Recipe:
Cast Ferric Schrabidate Plate×64 ×2 + Dense BSCCO Wire×64 ×2
Nuclear Charge×64 + Heavy Duty Element×64 ×3
Heavy Duty Element×64 + Quantum Computer + UFO Coin
Requires: §bGerald The Construction Android Blueprint§f

§6Orbital Module§f (Assembly Machine):
Duration: §e120s§f | Power: §e2 kHE/s§f
Recipe: Aluminium Shell×4 + Rubber Bar×16 + Solid Fuel×16 + Small Thruster×3 + Advanced Control Unit×3 + Low-Density Element

§6Launch Procedure§f:
§b1.§f Apply satellite code to Gerald using Satellite ID Manager (match codes)
§b2.§f Fuel Soyuz with 128,000 mB kerosene + liquid oxygen
§b3.§f Power the launch platform (750 kHE)
§b4.§f Press launch, wait 30 seconds
§b5.§f Get "Apogee" achievement
§b6.§f Use satellite designator to choose coordinates (preferably far from base)
§b7.§f Press red button — Gerald impacts, creating §e600-block radius§f crater

§6Osmiridium§f
After Gerald's impact, collect §bOsmiridium-Infused Tektite§f (hbm:ore_tektite_osmiridium) from the crater. Process through a refinement chain:
→ Impure Osmiridium Powder
→ Cast Osmiridium Plate (Foundry: 3 ingots per cast)
→ Welded Osmiridium Plate (Plasma Forge: 2 cast plates + 16,000 mB Reformate Gas, §e300s§f, §e1 GHE/s§f)

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bEuphemium Compound Plates§f — requires osmiridium ingot
§b• §bDFC Components§f — require welded osmiridium plates
§b• §bFEnSU§f — requires welded osmiridium plates
§b• §bOsmiridium Anvil§f — not recommended (shares recipes with DNT anvil)

§cWarning§f: Gerald's impact creates a §e600-block§f crater filled with lava, sets everything on fire for a day, and fills the sky with ash for §e600 days§f! Do this FAR from your base!

§eTip§f: Set up a mining operation at the crater site with automated transport back to base. Each Gerald launch yields limited osmiridium, so make the most of it. You'll need significant amounts for DFC and FEnSU.
